headline_summary: Insufficient credible, citable source coverage available in-session to build the required 30-60 unique Middle East events from the last 24-72 hours.
Previously present workspace draft contained only 3 Reuters-cited events focused on Strait of Hormuz diplomacy and shipping security; this does not meet required volume.
To avoid fabricating events or timestamps, this output is an explicit stub pending additional data sources (news feed/API or provided dataset).
risk_drivers: Tooling/data limitation: only a small number of citable articles could be retrieved during this run
Requirement mismatch: 30-60 distinct, non-duplicate events cannot be assembled without broader source ingestion
High consequence area (Hormuz/shipping/energy) implies potentially severe market risk, but specifics cannot be responsibly enumerated without sources

Energy: Unquantified upside risk to crude and refined products due to potential shipping disruption; cannot detail without additional sources.
FX: Potential risk-off USD strength / EM FX pressure channel; cannot detail without additional sources.
Rates: Potential widening in credit spreads and shifts in term premia during escalation; cannot detail without additional sources.
Equities: Potential rotation toward energy/defense and away from shipping- and fuel-intensive sectors; cannot detail without additional sources.
